name: O.R.C. Potato Beetle
description: The O.R.C. Potato Beetle is the controlled version of Brookhollow's potato beetle. It keeps its heavy body and frontal pressure, but now uses its charges with much more consistency inside O.R.C. waves.
behavior: It patrols gardens and O.R.C. zones with slow steps until it finds a line to charge. Even when it looks clumsy, it is usually setting up the next frontal angle.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and heavily punishes anyone who misreads the timing on its charges. If you let it reset space, it comes back in with much harsher pressure.
interactionWithCreatures: Inside O.R.C. formations it usually acts as the heavy line-breaker, opening space for faster or aerial units.
strategy: Fresh remains its biggest weakness. Block the charge, punish the end of the side hit, and do not overstay behind it unless you have already forced out the rear kick.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 106.25. Running Charge: 162.5. Side Hit: 137.5. Back Buck: 162.5.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A short mandible attack used to open pressure once it is already on top of the player.

abilities.name: Running Charge
abilities.description: It runs in a straight line and slams in with its full weight to collapse distance immediately.

abilities.name: Side Hit
abilities.description: It swings its body sideways to punish anyone circling it too early.

abilities.name: Back Buck
abilities.description: It lashes out with a violent rear kick to displace anyone lingering behind it.
